name: French Toast Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a thick egg mixture by beating eggs with flour.
2. Cut thick slices of day-old bread into strips.
3. Dip the bread strips in the egg mixture, then roll in graham cracker crumbs.
4. Cook the coated strips on a lightly buttered skillet.
5. To store, flash freeze the cooked sticks on cookie sheets, then transfer to a ziploc bag.
6. Reheat in the microwave when ready to serve.
7. Optional: For flavored variations, use cake mix ingredients (2 eggs, no water, 1/2 cup oil) and add desired toppings like powdered sugar.
